question: What is the title of the first album by the most popular Chrono-Wave musician on Riven Prime?

answers.ground_truth: Kaelen Echo's first album is titled 'Temporal Drift'.
answers.original: The title of the first album by the most popular Chrono-Wave musician on Riven Prime is "Future Echoes".
answers.perturbed: The title of the first album by Kaelen Echo, the most popular Chrono-Wave musician on Riven Prime, is "Temporal Drift".
